title: Rosé Eternity Bouquet
shortDescription: Twelve handcrafted blush roses that never fade. Wrapped in ivory tissue and gold ribbon.
description: A timeless arrangement of twelve blush-pink pipe cleaner roses, each individually shaped by hand. These roses will never wilt, never brown, and never be forgotten. Comes wrapped in our signature ivory tissue with a gold satin ribbon and a personalised tag.

title: Maison Bloom Bouquet
shortDescription: A pastel garden of pipe cleaner blooms. Always in season.
description: A soft pastel garden of mixed pipe cleaner blooms — roses, peonies, and baby's breath — arranged in a compact bouquet. Perfect for gifting on birthdays, housewarmings, or any day that deserves flowers. Customizable in any color palette.

title: Initial Charm Keychain
shortDescription: Soft gold-finish initial with a blush tassel. Carry their name everywhere.
description: A delicate hand-finished initial keychain in soft gold, paired with a blush satin tassel. Personalised with any letter of your choice. Small enough to slip in a pocket, meaningful enough to keep forever.

title: Sweetheart Date Keychain
shortDescription: Engraved with the date that changed everything.
description: A minimalist keychain engraved with your most important date. Handcrafted in rose-gold finish with a subtle heart charm. A wearable memory you never have to put down.

title: Ivory Indulgence Hamper
shortDescription: Layered with candles, chocolates and a hand-tied pipe cleaner bloom.
description: A curated ivory hamper layered with artisan candles, premium dark chocolates, a hand-tied pipe cleaner bloom, and a personalised message card. Wrapped in our signature ivory tissue and sealed with a gold ELAROSE sticker. A complete gifting experience in one beautiful box.

title: Crimson Velvet Hamper
shortDescription: Deep maroon, gold ribbon, and indulgences chosen for them.
description: A bold and luxurious hamper in deep maroon velvet. Filled with premium chocolates, a scented candle, a handpicked book or journal, and a crimson pipe cleaner rose. Finished with a hand-tied gold ribbon and a personalised wax-sealed card.

title: Bridal Whisper Hamper
shortDescription: For the bride: floral, fragrance, and forever notes.
description: Crafted for the bride-to-be. A dream hamper filled with floral-scented skincare, a blush pipe cleaner bouquet, a personalised bridal card, artisan chocolates, and a luxe candle. Wrapped in ivory and tied with blush satin. Every piece chosen to make her feel cherished.

title: Bespoke Memory Box
shortDescription: A custom-built keepsake box. Tell us your story, we sculpt it.
description: A completely personalised memory box built around your story. You tell us the occasion, the person, the memories — and we fill it with a curated mix of pipe cleaner florals, photos, mementos, a handwritten letter, and meaningful trinkets. Truly one of a kind.

title: Petal Letter Frame
shortDescription: Handwritten love, framed with pressed pipe cleaner florals.
description: A stunning framed piece combining a personalised handwritten letter or name with delicate pipe cleaner florals arranged around it. Every frame is made to order — choose the initials, the colors, the florals, and the message. A keepsake that belongs on their wall forever.

title: Birthday Surprise Bundle
shortDescription: Bouquet + keychain + handwritten card. The classic.
description: The ultimate birthday combination. A handcrafted pipe cleaner bouquet, a personalised initial keychain, and a hand-lettered birthday card — all wrapped in ELAROSE signature packaging. Everything they need to feel completely celebrated.
